title: AI Engineer
company_focus: Meal benefits platform for companies to feed employees
description:
About Sharebite

Sharebite is the leading meal benefits platform built
exclusively for companies to feed their employees. Our
platform allows employees to order meals from any restaurant
while streamlining all of the ordering & billing
requirements for the company. Every meal ordered through the
Sharebite platform results in a meal donation to local
partners like City Harvest and Feeding America to help
combat food insecurity. To date, Sharebite has donated over
15 million meals.

About the Role

As an AI Engineer, you will play a key role in shaping how
Sharebite applies AI across both its product and internal
operations. You will begin by working closely with the
product and engineering teams to build a deep understanding
of the codebase, core workflows, business logic, and
operational complexity behind the platform. We see that
foundation as essential to building AI solutions that are
not only innovative but genuinely useful.

As you grow into the role, you will identify high-impact
opportunities to use AI to improve efficiency, streamline
manual work, and enhance the product experience for
customers and internal teams. You will be responsible for
designing, building, and refining AI-powered tools,
automations, workflows, and product features that are
practical, scalable, and well-integrated into the business.
This role is ideal for someone who wants to pair full stack
engineering with applied AI work and have a meaningful
influence on how the function develops over time.

A note on the role: this position starts as a Full-Stack
Engineer and evolves into an AI Engineer over time. If
you’re looking for a pure AI/ML research role, this likely
is not the best fit. If you’re someone who loves building
real products and wants to apply AI engineering over time,
this role is perfect for you.

What You’ll Do

- Build and ship full-stack features across the product as you
  ramp up on the platform
- Develop a thorough understanding of our systems, data
  models, and business logic
- Identify high-leverage automation opportunities as you learn
  how the platform works
- Design and build AI agents and automated workflows using
  modern AI tooling
- Integrate LLMs into product workflows in ways that are
  reliable and production-safe
- Evaluate, iterate, and improve AI systems based on real-
  world performance
- Collaborate with product and engineering to solve user-
  facing problems
- Help define what effective, responsible AI engineering looks
  like at our company

Required Skills & Experience

- 5+ years of full-stack development experience, with a proven
  ability to own features end-to-end
- 1–2 years of hands-on AI engineering experience building and
  shipping LLM-powered systems in production
- Experience with at least one major AI orchestration
  framework such as LangChain, LangGraph, or AWS Bedrock
- Familiarity with LLM APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.), vector
  databases, RAG pipelines, and agent frameworks
- Strong software engineering fundamentals, including system
  design, testing, debugging, and clean code practices
- Clear communicator who can work across product and
  engineering teams

Who You Are

- Genuinely curious about how systems work, and not just how
  to layer AI on top of them
- Comfortable starting as a full-stack engineer and growing
  into AI engineering as you learn the product
- Thoughtful about where AI adds real value and where it
  doesn’t
- Someone who takes ownership and doesn’t wait to be told what
  to improve
- Excited by the idea of being the person who shapes how an
  entire company thinks about AI

What Success Looks Like

- 0–3 months: You’re shipping product features independently
  and have a strong mental model of how the platform works
- 3–6 months: You’ve shipped your first AI-powered workflow or
  agent into production
- 6–12 months: You’ve automated multiple high-impact workflows
  and are proactively identifying the next wave of
  opportunities

At Sharebite, we are committed to providing competitive pay
in line with industry and market standards. The base
compensation range for this role is $110-$130k per year,
however actual compensation packages are based on a wide
array of factors unique to each candidate including but not
limited to skill set, years & depth of experience, and
location. Salary is just one component of Sharebite's total
compensation package, which includes equity, multiple health
insurance options, and a wide range of benefits, including a
daily meal stipend.

At Sharebite, we're passionate about our mission to
alleviate hunger and inspire employees to connect their work
to a larger purpose. We know being well fed is an essential
ingredient for employee wellbeing, team performance, and
company culture - we've seen the results! Sharebite is proud
to have been recognized as Inc. Magazine's Best in Business,
Fast Company's Best Workplaces for Innovators, and Inc
5000's Fastest Growing Companies.

Join our team and help bring do-good, feel-good eating to
the world.

Sharebite is proud to be an Equal Opportunity Employer
building a diverse and inclusive workforce. If you need
additional accommodations to feel comfortable during your
interview process, please email us at
accessibility@sharebite.com.

If you are a resident of the State of California and would
like a copy of our CA privacy notice, please email
hr@sharebite.com.
responsibilities: Build and ship full-stack features across the product platform
Develop understanding of systems, data models, and business logic
Identify high-leverage automation opportunities within the platform
Design and build AI agents and automated workflows using modern AI tooling
Integrate LLMs into product workflows in reliable and production-safe ways
Evaluate, iterate, and improve AI systems based on real-world performance
Collaborate with product and engineering to solve user-facing problems
Help define responsible AI engineering practices across the company
use_cases: Automating internal workflows to improve operational efficiency
AI-powered product features enhancing the meal benefits platform experience
Intelligent agents for streamlining ordering and billing processes
LLM-driven automation of manual tasks for customers and internal teams
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves designing and building AI agents,
integrating LLMs into product workflows, and shipping LLM-
powered systems in production. Although it starts as a full-
stack engineer role, it explicitly evolves into hands-on AI
engineering with LLMs, agent frameworks, and RAG pipelines,
making it ai-first.
